title: tannodia perrieri var. perrieri
intro: Tannodia perrieri var. perrieri is a plant species from the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the Madagascar spurge. The plant's medicinal properties are derived from its milky latex, which is used to treat various health conditions. Tannodia perrieri var. perrieri has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex is often extracted and used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
